title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ipca Laboratories - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Ipca Laboratories - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ipca Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ipca Laboratories:
Ipca Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
